title: Cuba partially restores power as President Díaz-Canel vows ‘unyielding resistance’ to U.S. oil blockade
summary_full: The communist-run island nation is thought to be facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union amid a U.S. oil blockade.
summary_public: The communist-run island nation is thought to be facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union amid a U.S. oil blockade.
